name: Al-Quran Cloud API
description: The Al-Quran Cloud API provides access to the full text of the Holy Quran with translations, transliterations, and audio recitations in multiple languages. It supports retrieval by surah, ayah, juz, manzil, ruku, page, and hizb quarter, as well as keyword search and metadata.
